positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest creature, combining elements of a deer, fox, and celestial beings. The creature should have graceful, flowing lines, geometric patterns etched into its fur, and large, luminous eyes. It is perched among stylized, bioluminescent flora—mushrooms, ferns, and glowing vines—against a deep twilight background. The composition should be symmetrical, featuring clean, defined silhouettes, strong contrast between the light flora/creature and the dark background, and a muted palette of sapphire blue, emerald green, and gold accents. Vector illustration style, suitable for single-color silkscreen printing, highly detailed, centered, flat design, high contrast, intricate linework, poster art.
negative: blurry, noisy, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, muddy colors, photography, realism, 3d render, copyright, trademark
